texto: The definition of teachers or gurus was unknown to everyone including the teachers in the campus. So the people present in the school campus weren’t teachers at all, he thought.They were just people supposed to act like robots and cram things related to the subjects in the brains of their students. A bit of general imparting of knowledge wasn’t allowed and wasconsidered as impudence. With this brief recap of his past, the wandering mind of Mr. Patil came back to the present.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ganesh Shiva Aithal: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The definition of teachers or gurus was unknown to everyone including the teachers in the campus.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, inspirational-life, teachers pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e dia-chuvoso.

They were just people supposed to act like robots and cram things related to the subjects in the brains of their students. A bit of general imparting of knowledge wasn’t allowed and was considered as impudence. With this brief recap of his past, the wandering mind of Mr. Patil came back to the present.

texto: As an idle mind either recalls its past or worries about its future, this Mr. Patil had sat indulged in his past. How beautiful his past life was, happy, lively and warm as the morning itself. It was a perfectly pictured cheerful life of afarmer.
